name: Southwestern Chicken Con Queso Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat peanut oil in a soup pot over medium heat.
2. Add onion, bell pepper, tomato, and jalapenos; sauté until the onion is almost translucent and garlic is golden brown.
3. Stir in minced garlic and cook for 1 minute more.
4. Add chopped cilantro, cumin, paprika, oregano, and coriander; stir to combine.
5. Stir in cooked chicken and chicken broth. Simmer over low heat for 30 minutes.
6. While the soup is simmering, prepare a roux: Melt butter in a skillet over low-medium heat. Add flour; cook, stirring constantly, for 3-5 minutes or until very light golden color is achieved.
7. Gradually whisk cream into the soup, then slowly stir in grated cheddar cheese.
8. Mix hot soup back into the pot and adjust seasoning if needed.
9. Serve with tortilla chips.
